prompt: blue mushroom wizard with sleepy eyes and a tiny glowing staff
userPrompt: blue mushroom wizard with sleepy eyes and a tiny glowing staff
expandedPrompt: A whimsical blue mushroom wizard character with a rounded cap resembling a mushroom. The wizard has oversized sleepy eyes that convey a sense of calm and magic. The silhouette is compact with a slightly curved body, featuring small limbs. The character holds a tiny glowing staff topped with a sparkling star. The wizard wears a cloak that mimics mushroom gills, with soft textures and a gradient of blue shades. The color palette includes bright blue tones with hints of white and soft lavender accents. The character has small, cute spots on its cap and a gentle smile, enhancing the enchanting and sleepy mood.

{

  "expandedPrompt": "A whimsical blue mushroom wizard character with a rounded cap resembling a mushroom. The wizard has oversized sleepy eyes that convey a sense of calm and magic. The silhouette is compact with a slightly curved body, featuring small limbs. The character holds a tiny glowing staff topped with a sparkling star. The wizard wears a cloak that mimics mushroom gills, with soft textures and a gradient of blue shades. The color palette includes bright blue tones with hints of white and soft lavender accents. The character has small, cute spots on its cap and a gentle smile, enhancing the enchanting and sleepy mood.",
  "subject": "blue mushroom wizard",
  "mood": "whimsical enchantment",
  "palettePlan": { "primary": "bright blue", "secondary": "soft lavender", "accent": "white glow" },
  "styleTags": ["cute mascot", "glossy SVG", "blue-avatar quality"],
  "visualChecklist": [
    "rounded mushroom cap",
    "oversized sleepy eyes",
    "tiny glowing staff with sparkles",
    "soft gradient cloak",
    "small limbs",
    "gentle smile",
    "cute spots on cap",
    "sparkling star at staff tip"
  ],
  "requiredDetails": [
    "mushroom cap shape",
    "blue color with white accents",
    "sleepy expression",
    "tiny glowing staff"
  ],
  "requiredRenderableDetails": [
    { "id": "cap_shape", "label": "mushroom cap", "acceptableShapes": ["rounded_cap"], "acceptableSockets": ["head"], "minimumCount": 1 },
    { "id": "tiny_staff", "label": "tiny glowing staff", "acceptableShapes": ["staff"], "acceptableSockets": ["hand"], "minimumCount": 1 },
    { "id": "eye_shape", "label": "sleepy eyes", "acceptableShapes": ["large_eyes"], "acceptableSockets": ["face"], "minimumCount": 1 },
    { "id": "cloak_shape", "label": "cloak resembling mushroom gills", "acceptableShapes": ["cloak"], "acceptableSockets": ["body"], "minimumCount": 1 }
  ],
  "forbiddenDetails": ["raw SVG", "HTML", "unvalidated custom shapes", "external images"],
  "qualityConstraints": ["oversized expressive head", "compact connected body", "readable silhouette", "valid renderer sockets only"]
}
